step_rationale: Retinoid metabolite; ventricular fibrillation predictor post-STEMI independent of atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: 9-cis-retinoic acid is a retinoid-signaling metabolite whose levels predict post-STEMI ventricular arrhythmia risk.

references.title: Human Plasma Metabolomics Identify 9-cis-retinoic Acid and Dehydrophytosphingosine Levels as Novel biomarkers for Early Ventricular Fibrillation after ST-elevated Myocardial Infarction.
